JOI-BLACKHOLE.title: Black Hole
JOI-BLACKHOLE.description: At the end of your turn, if this has 5 or more stacks, lose HP equal to the number of stacks and remove this power.
JOI-WHITEHOLE.title: White Hole
JOI-WHITEHOLE.description: At the end of your turn, deal damage equal to the number of stacks to ALL enemies, then lose 1 stack.
JOI-CHARM.title: Charm
JOI-CHARM.description: Damage is redirected to this unit instead until the end of its turn.
JOI-AXISCORE.title: Axis Core
JOI-AXISCORE.description: Your summon. It intercepts damage from enemies for you.
JOI-SLEEP.title: Sleep
JOI-SLEEP.description: Cannot act. Loses 1 stack at the end of turn.
JOI-SUMMON.title: Summon
JOI-SUMMON.description: Summon [gold]Axis Core[/gold]. If already summoned, increase its Max HP for this combat.
JOI-FEED.title: Feed
JOI-FEED.description: Choose a card from your hand. When drawn, if [gold]Axis Core[/gold] is in play, automatically play it.
